method_note: Built from podcast script openings 2026-05-16 through 2026-05-20 (last 5 days of aired episodes) plus the listener's standing-priority list. daily_notes table from data/politics.db was unreachable from the Linux drain sandbox due to the same FUSE/sqlite mount blocker that the project memory flags; recommend a Windows-side re-run that ingests daily_notes if the listener has added new notes since the prior themes rollup.
